description_long: This object features a robust metallic lattice framework with a central vertical tower supporting two large, horizontally extended crossarms that resemble stylized wings. The crossarms are ribbed and segmented, with a dark, matte finish, and are attached to the upper section of the structure. At the base, two wide, ski-like supports provide stability, while the midsection contains visible mechanical components and bracing. A propeller-like element is mounted at the top, suggesting a mechanical or electrical function. The overall design is industrial, with exposed bolts, trusses, and a utilitarian aesthetic, suitable for urban infrastructure.
description: A metallic lattice tower with wide, ribbed crossarms and ski-like supports, featuring mechanical components and a propeller at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the crossarms and the central lattice structure, with the ski-like supports visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the crossarms, the propeller at the top, and the elongated ski supports extending forward and backward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the crossarms' span and the structural symmetry of the tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the ribbed crossarms' profile and the mechanical details at the midsection.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: Two large, ribbed crossarms are arranged horizontally in a single tier, extending symmetrically from the central tower.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: No visible power lines are attached; the structure appears to lack external wiring or cabling.
